steps.description: Press the F1 key to invoke the command palette in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Type text into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette: 'Show Output Channels'.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the "Show Output Channels" command in the Visual Studio Code Command Palette.
Click on the "Select Output Channel" dropdown in the top bar to open the list of output channels.
Type text: 'Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit' into the search bar located at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" from the dropdown menu within the search bar in Visual Studio Code.
